Off Calendar Jul-28-2016 Off Calendar
Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time For Hearing On Motion For Leave To File Amended Petition

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust, And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman & James Geagan for (petitioner) Plutarch Sideris. Raul Picardo for (respondents) Nila Bautista, Rhea Donaldo, Marilou Ancheta & Ver4ne Doxey. Calvin Abe for (trustee) Kathy Nakagawa.

The Court asked the parties if they are ready for trial and if they have talked to each other. Mr. Geagan confirmed that they have 8 witnesses or more and expects trial to last 5-7 days. Mr. Picardo stated that they will have the same witnesses. The Court stated that they will be sent to trial in department 206 and asked about dates. Mr. Geagan stated that he will file a motion to advance the trial date to be within 120 days. The parties were sent out to agree on a trial date, and reported back that they had agreed on August 1, 2016. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on August 1, 2016.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust, And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust, And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-26-2016 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for (petitioner) Plutarch Sideris. Raul Picardo for (repondents) Nila Bautista, Rhea Donaldo & Marilou Ancheta. Calvin Abe for (trustee) Kathy Nakagawa and specially appearing on behalf of the Nature Conservancy.

The Court stated that there has been a challenge to the trust. Mr. Picardo stated that they have tried mediation and that they want an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Lieberman stated that they are not ready and that the trial would take 3 days. Mr. Picardo stated that they are ready for trial. Mr. Lieberman reported that they have subpoenaed records, that they need to take 2 depositions, that they have sent out interrogatories and that this will take 60 days. Mr. Abe stated that they have not planned discovery yet but that he will want to discuss such with the trustee. The petition to determine validity of purported trust and to impose constructive trust was continued to March 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to complete discovery, with the expectation that the parties will have met and conferred and that a joint status statement is to be filed by March 22, 2016 with time estimates and that issues to be tried.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
